data.title: Modern Experience Clinic in Maple Grove, MN, offers brain stimulation therapy for depression, anxiety, OCD, and binge eating. Wellness Party on Oct. 30 showcasing new treatment during National Depression and Mental Health Screening Month.
data.description: A Wellness Party scheduled for October 30 in MAPLE GROVE, Minn., during National Depression and Mental Health Screening Month will highlight a new treatment option. The event aims to showcase a revolutionary, noninvasive approach for individuals hoping to alleviate depression, anxiety, OCD, and binge eating without medication. This initiative comes as part of efforts to raise awareness about mental health issues and alternative treatment methods.

data.title: Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) will announce Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 28, 2025, followed by a conference call at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET.
data.description: Bloom Energy Corporation (NYSE: BE) has scheduled to unveil its third quarter 2025 financial results on October 28, 2025, after the market closes. Following this, the company’s management will conduct a conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (PT) / 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (ET) to delve into these figures. The Q3 2025 Conference Call and Webcast will transpire on October 28, 2025, lasting for approximately 60 minutes. Participants can engage live by dialing 1.888.596.4144 (toll-free) | 1.646.xxxx.xxxx.

data.title: New Vista Oaks community by Toll Brothers opening on Oct. 11 in Rocklin, California, featuring luxury homes in prime location.
data.description: A new upscale residential community is set to open on October 11 in Rocklin, offering luxurious homes in a highly sought-after location. This exclusive development showcases a range of prestigious properties tailored for the discerning homeowner. The community promises a blend of modern design, high-end amenities, and a prime setting. Home prices start at [specific price range] and are expected to attract buyers looking for a luxurious lifestyle in Rocklin. With its grand unveiling on the horizon, this community represents a unique opportunity for those seeking upscale living in a desirable area.

data.title: Louisburg Garage in Cuba City, WI sold from Mike Timmerman Trust to Chad Richardson by Performance Brokerage Services.
data.description: Leading in dealership buy-sell transactions, Performance Brokerage Services recently facilitated the sale of Louisburg Garage in Cuba City, Wisconsin. The sale involved the transfer of ownership from the Mike Timmerman and Mary Ann Timmerman Survivors Trust to Chad Richardson. This significant transaction took place in Irvine, California on Oct. 10, 2025. With this sale, Performance Brokerage Services continues to demonstrate its expertise in facilitating successful dealership transactions.

data.title: Ralliant Corp (NYSE: RAL) to release Q3 earnings on Nov 5th with conference call on Nov 6th at 8:30am ET. Call: 877-407-8211 in U.S. or +1 201-389-0902 outside U.S.
data.description: Ralliant Corporation, listed under NYSE as RAL, is set to announce its third quarter 2025 earnings post the closing of NYSE on November 5, 2025. A conference call will follow on November 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET to delve into the results. For participation in the call, individuals within the U.S. can dial 877-407-8211, while those outside can connect via +1 201-389-0902 before 8:30 a.m. ET and must notify the operator.

data.title: Elastic approves $500 million share buyback program without expiration date, showing confidence in the company.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) disclosed a new share repurchase initiative where they are set to buy back up to $500 million of their existing ordinary shares as authorized by the Board of Directors. This program has no set expiration date, allowing flexibility in timing. It signifies confidence from the Board and management in Elastic's business performance, strategy, and operational capabilities.

data.title: Alamar Biosciences introduces NULISAqpcr™ BD-pTau217 Assay for Alzheimer's research, achieving high sensitivity and specificity.
data.description: Alamar Biosciences, based in FREMONT, Calif., has introduced a cutting-edge blood-based assay on Oct. 9, 2025. The assay provides exceptional sensitivity and specificity, paving the way for advanced assay development. Specializing in precision proteomics for early disease detection, Alamar Biosciences aims to revolutionize the healthcare industry.

data.title: Seguritech to attend 18th NENA Congress, showcasing their advanced security technology. Key event in Miami on Oct. 9, 2025.
data.description: Seguritech, a prominent company specializing in advanced security technology integration, revealed its involvement in the 18th Annual National Emergency Number Association ("NENA") event today in Miami. This move aligns Seguritech with other key industry players to enhance strategic focus within the security sector. The event aims to address crucial emergency services issues and promote collaboration among stakeholders. Established as a significant player in the security space, Seguritech's participation underscores its commitment to industry advancements. The event is set to bring together over 500 industry professionals and experts to discuss the latest trends and innovations in emergency response services.

NHC: Significant risk of flash flooding across the southwestern United States through the weekend.

data.title: Introducing Spectrum App Store for seamless entertainment, offering up to $125 monthly retail value on streaming apps. Tracy Morgan stars in ad.
data.description: Famous comedian Tracy Morgan is featured in a new advertisement aimed at sports enthusiasts, questioning the availability of his beloved Knicks game. The ad promotes the Spectrum App Store, which simplifies the process for customers to activate and enhance their streaming apps without additional charges. This service offers a value of up to $125 per month.

data.title: Via Transportation, Inc. (NYSE: VIA) to reveal Q3 2025 results on Nov 13, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: Via Transportation, Inc. (NYSE: VIA) has revealed that its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 will be disclosed on Thursday, November 13, 2025, before the opening of the U.S. financial markets. An accompanying conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (5:30 a.m. Pacific Time) to delve into the details of the third quarter's financial performance. The call is a part of Via's routine procedure in making public its financial updates.

data.title: Startup 375ai secures $10M for real-world AI using Edge Data Network.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This decrease has resulted in over 250,000 new jobs being added to the economy, with the majority of the growth coming from the service and technology sectors. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 4%, indicating positive growth in the labor market. Experts predict that these trends are likely to continue in the coming months, providing a promising outlook for the economy.

data.title: Peter Gasparro named Midwest Regional Channel Manager of the Year by Zultys. Award received at 2025 Sandler Partners National Summit in California on October 8.
data.description: Zultys, a leading provider of omnichannel unified communications and integrated contact center solutions, is pleased to disclose that Peter Gasparro, the North Central Regional Sales Manager, has been honored as the Sandler Partners Midwest Regional Channel Manager of the Year. Gasparro was presented with the award at the 2025 Sandler Partners National Summit during the National Summit Awards Gala & Dinner held in Huntington Beach, California, on October 8th. This accomplishment signifies Gasparro's excellence in the role and his outstanding contribution to the company.
Osisko Development increases initial life offering in bought deal and adds private placement.

data.title: Market indexes fell, Russell 2000 leading the pullback. Nvidia rises with Taiwan Semi's strong September sales.
data.description: Thursday saw a decline in the Dow Jones and other key indexes, while Nvidia experienced an increase as Taiwan Semiconductor, a supplier, reported robust sales in September. The Russell 2000 led the pullback, accompanied by a significant drop in gold stocks. Additionally, insights were drawn from Ferrari's sudden plunge in the market, providing live coverage on these developments.

data.title: Investors anticipate gains from $20B US bailout for Argentina linked to Treasury Sec's connections.
data.description: A $20 billion financial aid package has been confirmed by the United States to support Argentina, with significant benefits anticipated for the allies of Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

data.title: Seadrill announces Q3 2025 earnings release and conference call in Hamilton, Bermuda.
data.description: Seadrill, a company based in Hamilton, Bermuda, has disclosed plans to release its third quarter 2025 earnings report. They also announced an upcoming conference call to discuss these financial results. The call will provide shareholders and interested parties with insights into the company's performance during the specified period. This move aims to increase transparency and communication with stakeholders. This development showcases Seadrill's commitment to keeping investors informed about its financial standing. Stay tuned for further updates regarding the exact date and time of the earnings release and conference call.

data.title: BP Prudhoe Bay Royalty Trust to distribute $4.8 million to unit holders on Oct 20, 2025 from sale of royalty interest.
data.description: BP Prudhoe Bay Royalty Trust has declared a distribution of roughly $4.8 million, equivalent to $0.23 per unit, scheduled for payment around October 20, 2025. This payout will be disbursed to unit holders recorded as of business closure on October 15, 2025. The distribution encompasses the earnings acquired from selling the overriding royalty interest, amounting to $3.7 million in cash, to GREP V Holdings, L.P. This transaction was initially disclosed on October 1, 2025.

data.title: Antigen Security partners with Cloud 9 Computing to launch Cyber-Insurance Savings Program, delivering resilience.
data.description: Cloud 9 Computing has introduced a new cyber-insurance savings program in collaboration with Antigen Security. This initiative was launched in Lake Mary, Florida on October 9, 2025. The partnership between Antigen Security, LLC and Cloud 9 Computing aims to provide resilience through design. Cloud 9 Computing Group is recognized for its expertise in managed IT and technology automation.
